task_description: Create a comprehensive user guide under book/user_guide/ that transforms beginners into experts. Includes README.md with TOC, 23 chapter markdown files across 5 sections, and 23 matching SVG illustrations. Content covers: Core Fundamentals (5 chapters), Intermediate Workflows (5 chapters), Advanced Customization (5 chapters), Troubleshooting (4 chapters), and Optimization & Scaling (4 chapters).

verification.summary: All 47 files validated: 24 markdown (1 README + 23 chapters totaling 19,402 lines), 23 SVGs (all valid XML). All SVG image references resolve. All README TOC links (23) resolve correctly. Every chapter contains all required elements (learning objectives, prerequisites, best practices, knowledge check quiz, use cases, code blocks, embedded SVG). SVG files use consistent style (960px viewBox, Segoe UI font, WCAG 2.1 AA colors).
